𓊽 🍑 James'👁⃤𓂀Season 🌈 𓊽 7/22/2026 10:47 PM
I might know more than most people, but I still don't know as much as you would think; I have a lot of unanswered questions, too, myself, DX.
you seem to know a lot about pokenexus and the mods and all the weird stuff that goes on behind the scenes
I don't mind answering basically any or specific questions, but trying to explain without knowing your prior background knowledge is quite difficult and would take a very long time; ESPECIALLY if you've started at a very base-level of information surrounding various events/situations, players, etc. I played the game nearly daily for nearly 6 years, and I've never really been the most "talkative" person, so a lot of things I wanted to say but felt like I couldn't for various reasons ended up piling up; and most of it is also just not very interesting; petty, assumptions/rumors/speculation, over-dramatic, or otherwise, so forcing myself to actually put in the work/effort towards releasing something I would be happy about, after, on a personal level, I mean, has been much more difficult than I originally anticipated; plus, what I wanted to do in general has shifted or evolved multiple times, and keeps growing into a larger and larger monster, and, ye... I've been slowly working on a "full-version" of an explanation from my side or perspective, so... probably better just to wait for that, unless you want clarification on very specific details about things you already know, suspect, have heard from others, etc. (edited)
𓊽 🍑 James'👁⃤𓂀Season 🌈 𓊽
I might know more than most people, but I still don't know as much as you would think; I have a lot of unanswered questions, too, myself, DX. you seem to know a lot about pokenexus and the mods and all the weird stuff that goes on behind the scenes I don't mind answering basically any or specific questions, but trying to explain without knowing your prior background knowledge is quite difficult and would take a very long time; ESPECIALLY if you've started at a very base-level of information surrounding various events/situations, players, etc. I played the game nearly daily for nearly 6 years, and I've never really been the most "talkative" person, so a lot of things I wanted to say but felt like I couldn't for various reasons ended up piling up; and most of it is also just not very interesting; petty, assumptions/rumors/speculation, over-dramatic, or otherwise, so forcing myself to actually put in the work/effort towards releasing something I would be happy about, after, on a personal level, I mean, has been much more difficult than I originally anticipated; plus, what I wanted to do in general has shifted or evolved multiple times, and keeps growing into a larger and larger monster, and, ye... I've been slowly working on a "full-version" of an explanation from my side or perspective, so... probably better just to wait for that, unless you want clarification on very specific details about things you already know, suspect, have heard from others, etc. (edited)

• https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Too_High_to_Die

(no one listens to this album anymore; nor did they ever much really, lol)

Conner O'Malley
The Mask (2023)
Too High to Die
Too High to Die is the eighth studio album by American rock band the Meat Puppets. The album was released on January 25, 1994, by London Records. It was produced by Butthole Surfers guitarist Paul Leary. The album's title is a parody of the Ramones' 1984 album Too Tough to Die. A limited edition of Too High to Die included the 10" vinyl promo EP...
